phases.P0_context: loaded handoff + afk-pipeline.md config + memory; two open bugs (#120, #136); picked #120 (merge-gate flake, root cause known, higher blast radius)
phases.P0.5_diagnose: confirmed 2 leak sites: useTasks.ts initial-load .then/.catch (primary) + TaskItem.tsx 600ms ring-pulse setTimeout (fingerprint sibling); syncProvider Seam-isolation timeout ruled OUT of scope (separate slow-test flake, not a teardown leak)
phases.P1_P3_spec: skipped separate spec — light single-slice bug, root cause pre-resolved; orchestrator implemented inline per dispatch-health fallback (small pre-resolved slice)
phases.P5_implement: branch fix/120-usetasks-unmount-guard off origin/master; cancelled-flag then upgraded to mountedRef guarding refresh() too; TaskItem timer ref+cleanup; new + amended tests

gate.ponytail_review: attempt1 died on API error (glm-5 retired, not a verdict); attempt2 FAIL (3 findings: vacuous test, refresh() unguarded, TaskItem untested); attempt3 PASS after fixes

review_findings_fixed: unmount test was vacuous — React 18 no-ops setState on unmounted fiber, so result.current can't detect a leaked setState; rewrote to assert on console.error after the .catch guard, mutation-verified
refresh() shared the unguarded pattern — replaced effect-local cancelled flag with a mountedRef guarding refresh() (all 4 mutation callers) + both mount continuations
TaskItem ring-pulse timer had no regression test — added clearTimeout-on-unmount spy in tapDotComplete.test.tsx, mutation-verified
verification: window-is-not-defined signature did not recur across 5+ post-fix full-suite runs; both new tests mutation-tested (fail when guard stripped)
fallbacks_fired: orchestrator-inline-implement (light bug, no separate implementer agent)
notes: DoD #3 fingerprint honestly amended not deleted — kept the separate syncProvider Seam-isolation 5s-timeout flake as its own entry (still live). 2 pre-existing local-ahead commits (S51 flip + handoff doc) untouched; git push owner-gated.
